description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a formal military-style uniform, featuring a buttoned jacket with epaulets and insignia on the shoulders. The uniform includes a badge or patch on the left chest and is paired with matching trousers. The figure has a short, neatly groomed beard and mustache, and short hair. The posture is upright with arms extended horizontally, suggesting a neutral or T-pose stance. The shoes are formal and closed-toe, complementing the overall official appearance. The facial expression is neutral, and the figure is not carrying any visible accessories or objects.
description: An adult male in a formal military-style uniform with insignia, standing upright with arms extended. The figure has a short beard, short hair, and wears formal shoes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full uniform, insignia, facial features, and both arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the straight posture, and the side seam of the uniform.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the uniform, the epaulets, and the back of the head and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, the right arm, and the side of the uniform.
attribute_clothing_type: formal military-style uniform with jacket, trousers, and epaulets
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
